title: Horrorgins
description: An addon for Origins that adds some spooky new origins!
body:
An add-on for Origins that adds a couple of spooky new origins!

The Lycan:
- Is functionally similar to a human during the day, save for one debuff
- Transforms into a large wolf at night

In Wolf form:
+ Has natural armour
+ Does more damage
+ Is faster
+ Can jump while sprinting to leap farther
+ Has night vision
+ Can kill creatures to gain hunger
- Cannot wear armour
- Cannot deal damage with weapons or tools at night
- Cannot sleep (right click a bed during day to set spawn)
- Exhausts faster
- Has a larger hitbox


Always:
+ Can howl (primary power key) to summon up to 3 tamed wolves
- Takes much more magic damage


The Ghost:
- Has two forms, translucent and invisible. Can switch with primary power key

Translucent:
- can swim through the air
- can phase through blocks, including the ground (press shift when standing. Automatic when swimming in air)
- takes damage in direct sunlight

Invisible:
- cannot attack
- cannot break blocks

Always:
- does not exhaust
- immune to fall damage
- cannot wear armour
- Has much less health
